desc: Global app-level toggles. Loaded once at boot.

scope: global (per machine — outside any context git repo)
desc: Per-machine identity. Maps each context to the @me person key for the current user.
Settings for one workspace: theme, calendar visibility, working hours, meeting type catalogue, available note themes.
Optional override for meeting types. Falls back to defaults if absent.
People directory for one workspace. Keyed by `key` for @mentions.
Place / location directory used for meetings.
Open + completed tasks. Inline-task markers in notes write here too.
Result / outcome log entries linked to a week.
All meetings (past + future) for one workspace.
Sidecar metadata for every note. Keyed by "<week>/<file>.md".
Markdown content for one note. Plain text on disk; structured fields live in notes-meta.json.

scope: per context · per week (gitignored hidden file)
desc: Editor autosave temp. Removed on explicit save or discard.
Lunr-style flat search index, rebuilt on save.
Vector embeddings for semantic search. One entry per indexed doc.
